reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placement.

review_content.Placements: Every year, 70 to 80% of the students are placed in this college. Top recruiting companies that come to this college are TCS, Wipro, Cognizant and many more, and they offer top roles to students, like software engineering and graduate trainee roles. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA. The average package is 10 LPA. Every year, 80% of students get an internship at TCS and Wipro in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent in our college. Classroom are neat and clean, and different types of books are found in our library. Wi-Fi are good and easy for students to get internet. Hostel facilities and rooms are neat and clean, plus food in both hostel and canteen is good. Students eat from our canteen every day, and they are satisfied with the food in canteen and hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80% of students got placed. The top recruiting companies is Wipro, Amazon and Flipkart. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top roles is marketing manager and product manager. Around 68% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. The B.Ed rooms are good with attached bathroom. The food is hygienic like home made food. The canteen also available. The infrastructure is good. The classrooms and labs are good. The library is good. The Wi-Fi facility also available. The sports facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2021

review_content.Placements: None of the students from our batch got placement because no institute or company came for college placements. Only 25% of the students of our batch came to the college regularly. Students take admission here only for the purpose of part-time study.
review_content.Infrastructure: During the period when I was studying in this college, there was neither a hostel nor Wi-Fi or any other facility. There were sports, etc., because there was no education, so students used to play different types of sports. In this college, there was no field for sports and sports teachers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Nirmala College in Kerala is good to take admission for M.Sc. Statistics.

review_content.Placements: College provides the best placement packages ranging from 3-5 LPA for this course. Over 70% marks are compulsorily required to take admission in this course. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Accenture, etc., provide internships through college. Companies are tie-up with this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides many facilities like fans, classrooms, bedrooms, a hostel, drinking water machines, etc. College hostel and department canteen provide tasty, hygienic, and clean food. College organizes sports tournaments and cultural events every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: In our institute, there are good placements and we can gain good knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students are placed in our college before pre-final. We add a training session for 1 week. They gave good suggestions about how to face interviews and how to crack the job. For placement, good companies hire, and skill knowledge is more important than CGPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, the infrastructure is medium because in some labs, there is no Wi-Fi and the system is not working, and in the hostel, there are good rooms available. In the canteen, they provide some food and variety. Then, per year, there will be some sports competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied because of security arrangements, and anyone can enter the campus.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Many reputed companies reached our college and collaborated for recruitment. Most of the students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for our course are average. Classrooms are not very spacious. Labs are available. A library is present with very few resources. The quality of the food available in the mess is acceptable and average. Limited medical and sports facilities are present.

paragraphs: Arihant Education Groupadmission is based on merit scores of the students in the last qualifying exam or course-level entrances accepted by it. The institution offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. These are offered in multiple streams, such asBusiness and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences and Teaching and Education. The institution offers courses in affiliation withDAVV - Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya. Candidates seeking admission toArihant Education Groupcan apply online on the official website.
lists: Arihant Education Group Fees: The total tuition fees for UG courses range betweenINR 31,000 - 6,10,000and the total tuition fees for PG courses range betweenINR 30,000 - 1,30,000. Additionally, students might also need to pay application, exam and other fee components. Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
Arihant Education Group Course Duration: The duration for UG courses is2 years - 3 yearsand the same for PG courses is2 years.

highlights.summary: Shree Ramkrishna Institute of Computer Education and Applied Sciences is an institute in Surat, Gujarat. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 18 courses across 6 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Shree Ramkrishna Institute of Computer Education and Applied Sciences programs include B.Sc., M.Sc. and PG Diploma. Shree Ramkrishna Institute of Computer Education and Applied Sciences courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences and Science, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 610 students. The fees at Shree Ramkrishna Institute of Computer Education and Applied Sciences ranges between INR 61,000 to 1,72,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are 70 percent of students placed in the course. The highest package is 3 LPA and the lowest is 1.2 LPA. About 50% of students get an internship in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are quite good. The hostel is also moderate in quality. Sports are conducted in our college.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very experienced and qualified and give us all the answers that's why we ask. The course is very relevant and the difficulty level of the exams is also moderate.

reviews_list.review_title: A honest review according to my perspective.

review_content.Placements: I have completed B.Sc. Biotechnology from Shree Ram Krishna Institute of Computer education and Applied Science in 2021-2024. According to me, the placement is average and high if students are capable enough and are interested to furnish their skills desperately. Because, the faculty is highly qualified and teach actively with passion. Additional, some are really strict with syllabus and assignments. The lowest package offered by them was 1.2 LPA and the maximum was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were: Life Cell, Libaba and manymore. Around 40% students got internship in government offered internship, in which 90% of students from class participated.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college enhances my confidence and eagerness to learn more, stand, and speak.

review_content.Placements: I had such a great experience and a great kickstart of my career as an IT professional. This college provides great exposure for company placements and internships only if you acquire great skills and knowledge and are eager to learn more about it. The teaching and placement faculty members are very good and collaborative.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides better facilities. The college has Wi-Fi. Classrooms have cleanliness and hygiene standards. The college has a girl's room. The canteen is not so worth but still, you'd get better food options. The computer labs have many computers that can fit each student specifically with great explanations through projectors. They conduct live demo sessions through workshops and seminars.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Students had not got internships and placements in our college. The salary packages were not offered to students. Marico visited our college but had not recruited students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not available for students. It was available for teachers only. Many books were not available in the library. We used to return books to the librarian at the time of exams. Classrooms were average. Our college had not provided a hostel for distant students.
review_content.Faculty: Some teachers were much more qualified. Our college provided low packages for teachers, which had become the reason for their resignations. The course curriculum was sufficient. There were no semester exams in our stream. We had yearly exams. The pass percentage was average.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has good faculty members and facilities.

review_content.Placements: You need 50% and above to be eligible. The fee is the same for all students, 22,000 per semester. For internships, you need to score 70%. Many courses like B.Sc., B.Com, M.Sc., botany and zoology are offered here. Internal and final semester exams are held every semester. Internal exams are of 20 marks, and final exams are of 60.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure. There are chemistry department, chemistry labs, and books are available in the library. The classrooms are well-furnished. There is no hostel in our college. The college has a canteen, and good food is provided here. Sports and games facilities are provided.
